introduction: Based on the historical story of ‘Zhuying and Kangtai visited Funan (Cambodia) and came across Indian envoy’ that happened at the Three Kingdoms period, the animation develops from the perspective of the second person ‘you’ recalling the memory of the future (all the narratives are adapted from historical documents, and uses the ‘portrait’ as the clue), and tries to describe the collective memories under the image of ‘Pabbajja’ in an abstract way. Gymnosophists who left home, exist in various cultures and religions. Their long journeys have really promoted cross-cultural communication and brought the scenery away from here to places far in the distance. In a modern world where ‘distance’ is gradually eliminated, how should we imagine the present?
